title: New BEST local AI image generator is here!
summary: Ideogram 4 is presented as an open-source local AI image generator with capabilities in text rendering, prompt adherence, bounding box control, and comic/manga generation. The tutorial covers installation via ComfyUI and integration with various nodes and workflows.
writeup: This tutorial presents Ideogram 4 as an open-source AI image generator that runs locally, with a focus on text rendering, prompt adherence, bounding box control, and comic and manga generation. It walks through installation via ComfyUI and integration with various nodes and workflows. The local inference angle matters for those who want to run text-to-image diffusion without relying on hosted services. Takeaways: the model targets accurate in-image text and layout control through bounding boxes, and ComfyUI serves as the setup and workflow environment.
